meaning: adj.<美>不规则四边形的,<英>梯形的
examples: By using little trapeziform AOI, the image processing time is reduced and the reliability of lane detection is improved.
The performance of trapeziform labyrinth screw pump was investigated by changing geometric parameters of trapeziform screw.
The pancreatic gland is also trapeziform, soft and ight pale pink. The structure of pancreatic gland has ramus with sublobes.
